---
title: Contact
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-shell page-shell-inner">
  <section class="section contact-section reveal">
    <div class="section-heading">
      <p class="eyebrow">Contact</p>
      <h2>Open to scientific collaboration and professional connection.</h2>
    </div>
    <p class="contact-copy">
      This site is meant to be a simple professional home base. Over time, I plan to add selected
      work in R, AI, and other tools that support modern evidence generation. For now, the easiest
      way to connect is through LinkedIn or email, and you can also download my resume directly
      below.
    </p>
    <p class="contact-copy">
      I'm especially interested in conversations around real-world evidence leadership,
      biostatistics strategy, evidence generation, and roles in biopharma where scientific rigor
      and practical execution both matter.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a
        class="button button-primary"
        href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/adamjdugan"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noreferrer"
      >
        Connect on LinkedIn
      </a>
      <a class="button button-secondary" href="mailto:adam.j.dugan@gmail.com">Email Me</a>
      <a class="button button-secondary" href="assets/docs/Adam-J-Dugan-Resume.pdf" download>
        Download Resume
      </a>
    </div>
  </section>

  <footer class="site-footer">
    <p>(c) <span id="year"></span> Adam J. Dugan, PhD</p>
    <p>Built as a Quarto-ready professional site.</p>
  </footer>
</div>
```
